---
title: "Quickstart"
description: "Connect GitHub, create a project, and review a suggestion."
---

<!-- Generated by DraftStack. Edit the blueprint or regenerate the site to change this file. -->

Start with the hosted DraftStack app at https://draftstack-dev.vercel.app.

Install the GitHub App, choose a documentation repository, add monitored repositories, then let DraftStack backfill recent merged pull requests.

Use the inbox to review each suggestion before a draft GitHub pull request is created.
